title: Compilot
description: Tiered multi-agent platform that tracks and analyzes competitor companies across the web. Runs 3 parallel scraper agents across 6+ sources (GitHub, RSS, job boards, HN) and synthesizes LLM conclusions into daily, weekly, and monthly intelligence reports.

title: Clarus
description: A student dashboard that syncs course data from Brightspace, organizes deadlines and grade weights, and generates AI-ranked study action plans.

title: ChefIt
description: A full-stack social cooking app that scans pantry items, matches recipes by ingredient coverage, and supports posts, reviews, and smart shopping lists.

title: WaterlooWorks+
description: A Manifest V3 Chrome extension that parses resumes and job posts, scores candidate fit, and adds dashboards and overlays to streamline co-op job screening.

title: Joblyze - AI Job Posting Analyzer
description: An AI-powered job posting analyzer that extracts required skills, compares them with resumes, and highlights gaps for stronger applications.

title: IoT-Enabled Electronic Safe
description: ESP32 safe with keypad, LEDs, buzzer, and temperature sensing; the web interface mirrors lock state and controls access in real time.

title: Delivery Drone - CAD Prototype
description: Designed and 3D-printed a delivery drone prototype in Fusion 360, iterating propeller arm connectors and custom axles into a functional scale model.
